subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में कौन सी पस्तरी है?
explanation_en:
Hawa Mahal is a famousfort located in Jaipur, known for its intricate designs and unique architecture.

question_hi: आपन के विशालीय इकों के विशालीय इकों
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal, also known as Hawa Mahal, is a famous fort located in Jaipur. It was built by Maharaja Man Singhji and Maharaja Pratap Singhji.
